creator: santhosh.raju@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 197299
Patch to upgrade the ports script to support din-37a builds.

Patch to upgrade the ports script to support din-37a builds.

DIN Is Noise has been updated from version 36 to version 37a.

I have made a patch that makes changes to the ports script to support building din-37a.

It would be nice if the patch can be applied to the ports tree of FreeBSD.

Thank you
Santhosh
